subject: Diagnose Hostinger backend failure
description: Inspect Hostinger website/deployment/build state and logs for manage.mujosaigon.com before modifying production.

metadata.observed: Hostinger JS deploy app_type=vite output dist
metadata.clarification: Static Vite deploy fixed to Express; /health now 200; /api/properties now reaches Express but returns 500; env vars not directly listable via available Hostinger MCP, using redacted runtime diagnostics next.
metadata.rootCause1: Hostinger was deployed as vite/static so /health and /api did not reach Express; fixed by Express package deploy.
metadata.rootCause2: DATABASE_URL parses correctly to Azure host webdbmujo.postgres.database.azure.com db m_management sslmode=require, but Prisma auth fails for user mujoadminh; password/credential invalid.
